name: tanda
title: Tanda Workforce
description: Read-only access to Tanda (workforce management): rosters/schedules, timesheets, leave requests and balances, and employee directory. Each user authenticates against their own Tanda account on first use, so queries return only data their Tanda account is scoped for.

credentials.label: Application ID
credentials.description: Shown as 'Application ID' on your registered app at my.tanda.co (Settings → API → Applications). (OAuth2 calls this the client_id.)

credentials.label: Application Secret
credentials.description: Shown as 'Secret' on the same registered-app page. (OAuth2 calls this the client_secret.)

credentials.label: Admin Refresh Token
credentials.description: Not surfaced in the wizard. Each Telegram user runs their own sign-in dance the first time they ask the bot anything Tanda-related — no platform-level token needed. Admins who want a platform token for direct/CLI use can set it via `sudo agenthq-cred set tanda_refresh_token`.

tanda_complete_auth.description: Finish the per-user OAuth dance — pass the redirect URL the user copied back from their browser

tanda_who_am_i.description: Diagnostic: report whether the calling user has linked their Tanda account

tanda_me.description: Sanity check + identity of the linked Tanda user (name, email, employee record id)

tanda_user_lookup.description: Find employees by name or email — resolves a person into their Tanda user_id

tanda_roster.description: Roster / schedule entries between two dates — optionally filter to specific user_ids

tanda_timesheets.description: Timesheet entries (clock-ins / shifts worked) for one date — what people actually did, vs. what they were rostered for

tanda_leave_requests.description: Leave requests overlapping a date range — optionally filter to specific user_ids

tanda_leave_balance.description: Leave balances for one user by user_id (annual leave, personal/sick, long-service, etc., in hours)

tanda_my_leave_balance.description: Convenience: leave balances for the currently authenticated Tanda user — answers 'how much leave do I have left?'

tanda_raw_get.description: Escape hatch: GET an arbitrary Tanda v2 API path with optional query params
